theme: Q3 is filling up — book your destination now

linkedin.text:
Your competitors locked in their Q3 2026 venues last month. The clock is now working against you.

Barcelona, Athens, Amsterdam, Prague — already 60% booked for July–September.

What we're seeing across our pipeline:
→ Companies booking 4–6 months earlier than pre-2024
→ Premium peak-season venues going first
→ Groups over 50 needing to secure flights now

The best time to start planning was last month. The second best time is today.

Still open for 2026:
🇪🇸 Barcelona & Madrid · 🇬🇷 Athens & Rhodes · 🇵🇹 Lisbon & Porto · 🇷🇸 Belgrade · 🇭🇺 Budapest

📅 Book a free 30-minute planning call this week before your first-choice dates close.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #EventPlanning #Leadership
